judge_reason: Description B explicitly states there are no visual elements on the page, directly contradicting Description A's detailed description of a pencil annotation, an ink blot, and paper condition, indicating a fundamental disagreement about the presence and nature of the visual content.
original_image_tags: A large, faint handwritten annotation in pencil spans the right side of the "FROM" and "TO" fields. It appears to read "File" or "Fila".

The entire form is printed on aged, yellowish-tan paper. A dark, irregular ink blot obscures the letters "M" and "E" in the top "MESSAGE FORM" title. The paper shows signs of wear, including creases and minor tears at the edges.
gpt_mini_desc: *Image: Scanned military message form with typed and handwritten entries, including a purple “SIGNALS OFFICE / 5 MAR 1945 / HEADQUARTERS” stamp in the upper right and red pencil markings near the top.*
